title: TAS circuit
description: A sub-netlist: components plus the connections (wires, couplings, externalPorts) between them. Reused at every scope: each stage owns one circuit; topology.interStageCircuit is a connection-only circuit (components array is empty).

name.description: Reference designator unique within the entire converter (e.g. 'Q1', 'L_pri', 'C_in'). Connection endpoints refer to components by this name.

data.description: The component itself: an inline PEAS document, or a URI string into a TAS data file (e.g. 'TAS/data/mosfets.ndjson?partNumber=C3M0032120K').

simulationOverride.description: Per-component SPICE override. Used when the part's simulation behaviour cannot be inferred from the PEAS document. Component values themselves are never overridden here — they come from PEAS.

model.description: Name of a model declared in TAS.simulation.models[] (or an externally available .lib name).

name.description: Net name (for wire/externalPort) or coupling identifier (for coupling). Unique within the entire converter.

kind.description: wire = internal electrical net shared by 2+ pins. coupling = magnetic coupling between windings (no shared node, maps to a SPICE K-element). externalPort = a wire that also terminates at an external converter terminal; its name doubles as the terminal label.

couplingCoefficient.description: k for kind=coupling. Required when kind=coupling, forbidden otherwise.

direction.description: For kind=externalPort: whether the converter sources, sinks, or both at this terminal. Required when kind=externalPort, forbidden otherwise.

pin.description: Pin on the referenced component. Required for kind=wire/externalPort, forbidden for kind=coupling.
